'''dhafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylotomically|xylotomically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylotomically|xylotomically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafate|dhafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafatesher|dhafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafatesherĂ«m|dhafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafatero|dhafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafateshĂ«|dhafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafateshĂ«m|dhafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafatero|gokidhafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafateshĂ«|gokidhafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafateshĂ«m|gokidhafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafankerom|godhafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafankeshĂ«|godhafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafankeshĂ«m|godhafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafankeya|godhafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafaterom|dhafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafatemu|dhafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafateya|dhafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafaterom|gokidhafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafatemu|gokidhafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafateya|gokidhafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafafate|dhafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafafatesher|dhafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafafatesherĂ«m|dhafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafafatero|dhafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafafateshĂ«|dhafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafafateshĂ«m|dhafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafafatero|gokidhafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafafateshĂ«|gokidhafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafafateshĂ«m|gokidhafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafafankerom|godhafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafafankeshĂ«|godhafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafafankeshĂ«m|godhafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafafankeya|godhafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafafaterom|dhafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafafatemu|dhafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafafateya|dhafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafafaterom|gokidhafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafafatemu|gokidhafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafafateya|gokidhafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠte|dhĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠtesher|dhĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠtero|dhĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠfĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠfĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠfĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠtemu|dhĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠfĂŠteya|dhĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠfĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠfĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafafte|dhafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafaftesher|dhafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafaftesherĂ«m|dhafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafaftero|dhafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafafteshĂ«|dhafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafafteshĂ«m|dhafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafaftero|gokidhafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafafteshĂ«|gokidhafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafafteshĂ«m|gokidhafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafafnkerom|godhafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafafnkeshĂ«|godhafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafafnkeshĂ«m|godhafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafafnkeya|godhafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafafterom|dhafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafaftemu|dhafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafafteya|dhafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafafterom|gokidhafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafaftemu|gokidhafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafafteya|gokidhafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
